lead_profile_text: Purchase — Off-plan 1 bed Manchester (Old Trafford area). STL mortgage arranged. Off-plan completion June 2026. Financial projections, direct bookings, guest screening and onboarding discussed.
emotional_profile: Long-term investor with pragmatic expectations; blocked purely by property completion date; engaged and progressed
green_light_trigger_phrases: follow up around June 2026 when keys received

top_objections.text: Same-block competition — multiple Airbnbs in same building
New listing ramp-up period — 3-6 months to build reviews
top_objections.zac_response: Acknowledged honestly; lead accepted given long-term investment mindset

top_questions.text: What income can I realistically expect?
top_questions.answer: Financial projections presented — gross and net figures outlined

top_questions.text: What does the onboarding process look like for a new property?

what_moved_them: STL mortgage already arranged — no consent to let barrier
Location demand fundamentals — Manchester off-plan area
Long-term investment mindset — realistic about initial ramp-up
what_fell_flat: Completion date means no action possible until June 2026

conversion_gaps.gap: Off-plan completion delay — onboarding not possible until June 2026
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Light-touch follow-up in May 2026 ahead of completion; keep engagement warm
